debug_info.goal:
S : HarmonicOscillator
IC : ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions
x : Time → Space 1
⊢ S.EquationOfMotion x ∧
      x 0 = ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.x₀ IC ∧
        Time.deriv x 0 = ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.v₀ IC →
    x = ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.trajectory S IC

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
simpa [hx0'] using hx0
  have hv0eq : ∂ₜ x 0 = ∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) 0 := by simpa [hv0'] using hv0
  have hdiff : ∀ t, ∂ₜ (∂ₜ (fun u => x u - (IC.trajectory S) u)) t =
      fun t => - S.ω ^ 2 • (x t - (IC.trajectory S) t) := by
    intro t
    have hxacc := congrArg (fun f => f t) (by
      simpa [EquationOfMotion, gradLagrangian_eq_force, force_eq_linear] using hx)
    have htracc := congrArg (fun f => f t) (by
      simpa [EquationOfMotion, gradLagrangian_eq_force, force_eq_linear] using htraj)
    have : ∂ₜ (∂ₜ x) t - ∂ₜ (∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S)) t =
        (- S.ω ^ 2 • x t) - (- S.ω ^ 2 • (IC.trajectory S t)) := by
      simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using congrArg (fun z => z) (by
        simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using congrArg (fun a => a) (by
          simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using (by
            have := congrArg (fun z => z) (by rfl)
            exact rfl)))
    simp [Time.deriv, sub_eq_add_neg] at this
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, smul_sub] using this
  have : x = IC.trajectory S := by
    funext t
    have := by
      have h0 : (fun u => x u - (IC.trajectory S) u) 0 = 0 := by simpa [hx0eq]
      have hv : ∂ₜ (fun u => x u - (IC.trajectory S) u) 0 = 0 := by
        simpa [Time.deriv, sub_eq_add_neg, hv0eq] using rfl
      exact (by
        have : (fun u => x u - (IC.trajectory S) u) t = 0 := by
          simpa using (by
            have : (fun u => x u - (IC.trajectory S) u) = fun _ => 0 := by
              funext u
              have : (fun u => x u - (IC.trajectory S) u) u = 0 := by
                simp
              simpa using this
            simpa [this])
        simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using this)
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using this
  exact this
